assembly_reference_syntax: Direct TileReg references use T0 through T255. T0 encodes id 0x00 and has TZERO source-only semantics. T1 through T255 are ordinary destination-capable TileReg ids.
description: v0.57 TileReg namespace. B.ITP and B.OTA encode an 8-bit architectural tile register id. T0/TZERO is source-only and ordinary ids 0x01..0xff are dynamically allocated tiles with descriptor metadata.
source_size_rule: Source TileReg size is not repeated in B.ITP. Hardware reads source allocation metadata from the TileReg rename/allocation table.
tzero_rule: T0/TZERO reads as a zero/null tile. It may pad unused source slots. Any reuse bit associated with T0/TZERO must be zero. T0/TZERO is illegal as a destination.
